This repository uses `AGENTS.md` as the canonical AI instruction file. Follow it for all coding tasks.

For code, diff, branch, or PR review requests, also follow the combined review orchestration from `AGENTS.md` / `.ai/skills/code-review/SKILL.md`, including all review workflows:

1. `.ai/skills/behavior-review/SKILL.md`
2. `.ai/skills/code-review/SKILL.md`
3. `.ai/skills/repo-review/SKILL.md`

Do not define independent repository rules in this file. Keep detailed rules in referenced `.ai/` files; `AGENTS.md` should remain a small router.
